title: gh#74: R5.2 — Switch routes/bulk-import.ts to BulkOperationFactory
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/74.
Backlog section: Candidate 5 — BulkOperationFactory.

## Context

Second PR in Candidate 5. Migrates the bulk-import route to the factory. Validates the factory shape against the first consumer; R5.3 validates against the second.

## Scope

- Modify `packages/api/src/routes/bulk-import.ts`:
  - Remove the inline idempotency-key parsing (`parseIdempotencyKey` + `UUID_PATTERN` regex — these move into the factory)
  - Remove the inline `bulk_operations` existence-check SELECT
  - Remove the inline insert + enqueue
  - Replace with a single `factory.startBulkOperation(...)` call
  - Profile / queue ownership checks STAY in the route (auth concern, not factory's job)
  - CSV parsing STAYS in the route (input-shape concern, not factory's job)
  - Route still emits the same response shape: `{ bulkOperationId, jobId, replay }`

- Inject `BulkOperationFactory` via the existing `BulkImportRouterDeps`

- Verify with existing integration tests — no behavior change

## Out of scope

- queues bulk-ops route (R5.3)
- Removing the standalone `bulk-ops-queue.service.ts` (R5.3 sweep)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/api build` and test pass
- `rg "UUID_PATTERN|parseIdempotencyKey" packages/api/src/routes/bulk-import.ts` returns no matches
- `rg "from.*'bulkOperations'" packages/api/src/routes/bulk-import.ts` returns no matches (the route doesn't import the table directly anymore)
- Existing bulk-import integration tests pass

## References

- Depends on: #73
